iotevents.detectormodel.iotevents.CfnAbo: Sends an AWS IoT Events input, passing in information about the detector model instance and the event that triggered the action.

iotevents.detectormodel.iotevents.InputN.Description: The name of the AWS IoT Events input where the data is sent.

iotevents.detectormodel.iotevents.Payloa.Description: You can configure the action payload when you send a message to an AWS IoT Events input.
